name: Santa is real
short_description: Dive into the Christmas spirit with "Santa is real", a captivating stealth adventure game! Step into the boots of Santa Claus and embark on a festive journey through 20 uniquely challenging levels. Your mission: to deliver Christmas joy undetected, using your wit and agility.
detailed_description:
Christmas Stealth Mission: Sneak into homes with your sack of Christmas gifts, timing each move to avoid detection.

Strategic Gameplay: Outsmart each level with careful planning. Utilize hiding spots and interact with the environment to elude discovery.

Varied Challenges: Face new, exciting obstacles in every level, keeping your Christmas adventure fresh and engaging.

Embrace the Holiday Joy: Immerse yourself in a game filled with the magic and joy of the Christmas season.

"Santa is Real" is perfect for players who love strategic stealth games and want to indulge in the festive cheer of Christmas. Can you spread holiday joy without getting spotted? Join the adventure and find out!
